claims.shell_level: replace with shell, regime, cutoff, scale, or model level
claims.projection: replace with projection, observable, invariant, approximation, or evidence channel
claims.statement: Draft claim statement. Keep this scoped and falsifiable.
boundary: State the hypotheses, regime, cutoff, or substrate limitations.
State what evidence would be required for promotion.

gates.expected: Claim boundary is explicit and not inflated.
Non-claim box blocks overstatement and is preserved in controller outputs.

gates.command: replace with exact repo-local command when available
gates.fixture: replace with fixture/proof artifact path when available
gates.expected: Replace with repo-local executable or reviewable check. Add input_digest/output_digest when status becomes pass.

non_claims.statement: This adapter does not claim the main theorem or final physical result until domain evidence and SocioSphere controller promotion gates pass.
